title: Resolution Congratulating and Commending the Provincial Government of Laguna for the Successful Conduct of Project B.r.e.a.s.t: Laguna Human Milk Bank Last February 2, 2023 in the Municipality of Los Baños. Councilor(s) Leren Mae M. Bautista, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap, Miko C Pelegrina, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Julius A. Moliñawe, Benedicto S. Alborida, Mike Dexter A.
